title: Photongraph
subtitle: The objective of this event was to make the students within our college and beyond aware of the art of Light Painting and to get them acquainted with the electronics required to arrange the lights.
description: Title of the event: PhotongraphObjective: The objective of this event was to make the students within our college and beyond aware of the art of Light Painting and to get them acquainted with the electronics required to arrange the lights. BVP Optica in collaboration with the Digital Arts Society of our college organised a light painting contest on 23rd December in which students from all over the country participated and submitted their best clicks. Light painting is the photographic technique
location: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, New Delhi
